packet_family_catalog.description: Implements release-local shared-object schemas, shared-object APIs, and package contracts from one accepted release blueprint.
Implements release-local services and workers from one accepted release blueprint while preserving typed control, provenance, and review boundaries.
Implements release-local app surfaces, projection grammar, inspect helpers, tests, and fixtures from one accepted release blueprint.
Implements the R7 chat-native commissioning surface slice together with shared projection and inspect helpers.
Implements the R7 Task Studio handoff landing slice over accepted `TS-SC-*` route modules only.
Implements the R7 contract-test and fixture slice, including handoff-continuity coverage.
